description: Style NoteEvery woman needs a choice of kurtas in her wardrobe. The USP of w is a simple, elegant silhouette, coupled with modern design details. In this kurta we see the traditional garment in a new avatar with W's innovative styling. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals. For a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris. Product Details Light pink printed kurta made of 100% viscose, has a round neck, short sleeves, has an empire waist and a vented hem Material and Care100% viscoseWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorations Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 32") is wearing a size M
